children.heading: Board
children.label: 1 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the National Sheep Promotion, Research, and Information Board established under .section 7104(b) of this title

children.heading: Carbonized wool
children.label: 2 Carbonized wool
children.text: The term “carbonized wool” means wool that has been immersed in a bath, usually of mineral acids or acid salts, that destroys vegetable matter in the wool, but does not affect the wool fibres.1So in original. Probably should be “fibers.”1

children.heading: Consumer information
children.label: 3 Consumer information
children.text: The term “consumer information” means nutritional data and other information that will assist consumers and other persons in making evaluations and decisions regarding the purchase, preparation, or use of sheep products.

children.heading: Customs Service
children.label: 4 Customs Service
children.text: The term “Customs Service” means United States Customs Service of the Department of the Treasury.

children.heading: Degreased wool
children.label: 5 Degreased wool
children.text: The term “degreased wool” means wool from which the bulk of impurities has been removed by processing.

children.heading: Department
children.label: 6 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the United States Department of Agriculture.

children.heading: Education
children.label: 7 Education
children.text: The term “education” means activities providing information relating to the sheep industry or sheep products to producers, feeders, importers, consumers, and other persons.

children.heading: Executive Committee
children.label: 8 Executive Committee
children.text: The term “Executive Committee” means the Executive Committee established under .section 7104(g) of this title

children.heading: Exporter
children.label: 9 Exporter
children.text: The term “exporter” means any person who exports domestic live sheep or greasy wool from the United States.

children.heading: Feeder
children.label: 10 Feeder
children.text: The term “feeder” means a person who feeds lambs until the lambs reach slaughter weight.

children.heading: Greasy wool
children.label: 11 Greasy wool
children.text: The term “greasy wool” means wool that has not been washed or otherwise cleaned.

children.heading: Handler
children.label: 12 Handler
children.text: The term “handler” means any person who purchases and markets greasy wool.

children.heading: Importer
children.label: 13 Importer
children.text: The term “importer” means any person who imports sheep or sheep products into the United States.

children.heading: Industry information
children.label: 14 Industry information
children.text: The term “industry information” means information and programs that will lead to increased efficiency in processing and the development of new markets, marketing strategies, increased marketing efficiency, and activities to enhance the image of sheep or sheep products on a national or international basis.

children.heading: Order
children.label: 15 Order
children.text: The term “order” means a sheep and wool promotion, research, education, and information order issued under .section 7103 of this title

children.heading: Person
children.label: 16 Person
children.text: The term “person” means any individual, group of individuals, partnership, corporation, association, cooperative, or any other legal entity.

children.heading: Processor
children.label: 17 Processor
children.text: The term “processor” means any person who slaughters sheep or processes greasy wool into degreased wool.

children.heading: Producer
children.label: 18 Producer
children.text: The term “producer” means any person, other than a feeder, who owns or acquires ownership of sheep.

children.heading: Producer information
children.label: 19 Producer information
children.text: The term “producer information” means activities designed to provide producers, feeders, and importers with information relating to production or marketing efficiencies or developments, program activities, or other information that would facilitate an increase in the consumption of sheep or sheep products.

children.heading: Promotion
children.label: 20 Promotion
children.text: The term “promotion” means any action (including paid advertising) to advance the image and desirability of sheep or sheep products to improve the competitive position, and stimulate sales, of sheep products in the domestic and international marketplace.

children.heading: Pulled wool
children.label: 21 Pulled wool
children.text: The term “pulled wool” means wool that is pulled from the skin of a slaughtered sheep.

children.label: A
children.text: is authorized by State statute or is otherwise organized and operating within a State;

children.label: B
children.text: receives voluntary contributions or dues and conducts promotion, research, or consumer information programs with respect to sheep or wool, or both; and

children.label: C
children.text: is recognized by the Board as the sheep and wool promotion entity within the State;

children.heading: Raw wool
children.label: 23 Raw wool
children.text: The term “raw wool” means greasy wool, pulled wool, degreased wool, or carbonized wool.

children.heading: Research
children.label: 24 Research
children.text: The term “research” means development projects and studies relating to the production (including the feeding of sheep), processing, distribution, or use of sheep or sheep products to encourage, expand, improve, or make more efficient the marketing of sheep or sheep products.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 25 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: Sheep
children.label: 26 Sheep
children.text: The term “sheep” means ovine animals of any age, including lambs.

children.heading: Sheep products
children.label: 27 Sheep products
children.text: The term “sheep products” means products produced, in whole or in part, from sheep, including wool and products containing wool fiber.

children.heading: State
children.label: 28 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the 50 States.

children.heading: Unit
children.label: 29 Unit
children.text: The term “unit” means each State, group of States, or class designation that is represented on the Board.

children.heading: United States
children.label: 30 United States
children.text: The term “United States” means the 50 States and the District of Columbia.

children.heading: Wool
children.label: 31 Wool
children.text: The term “wool” means the fiber from the fleece of a sheep.

children.heading: Wool products
children.label: 32 Wool products
children.text: The term “wool products” means products produced, in whole or in part, from wool and products containing wool fiber.
